_comment_1: Drop-in snippet for .claude/settings.json — merge the hooks block into your existing settings (don't replace the whole file).
_comment_2: Per Claude Code's real hook contract (https://code.claude.com/docs/en/hooks): the matcher is a regex over tool name only. There is no native filter.path syntax. The hook itself reads stdin, parses tool_input.file_path, and decides whether to enforce. Defensive in-script filtering keeps Write/Edit on non-audit files passing through cleanly.
_comment_3: Path syntax: $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR for per-project install, $HOME for global install. Pick the form that matches your install location. See docs/INSTALLATION.md for both options.

PreToolUse._comment: Block writes of audit reports that violate R1, R2, R4, or R6.

PostToolUse._comment: Validate the final report shape after writing. Warning-only — pre-emit is the hard gate.
